title: Mirror Feature for subitems' columns across the boards
excerpt: Hi, it would be great to mirror the subitem’s columns values/content across the related boards so that it’s easier to make the boards more simplified without much calculations columns needed.

posts.author: Jack1111 (Jack Ang)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, it would be great to mirror the subitem’s columns values/content across the related boards so that it’s easier to make the boards more simplified without much calculations columns needed.

posts.author: LSC (Lori Straus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed.
And adding “Note: this feature does not work with subitems” at the top of any help page would be most welcome where the content doesn’t apply to subitems (like the entire connected board/mirror function) would be most helpful. I’ve just wasted an hour playing with connected boards only to realize they don’t work with subitems. Yet the wording on many of the help pages makes it sound like the sky’s the limit.
I sometimes spend more time trying to force Monday to work for me than actually getting work done.
